home.title: Postal Security Incident Reporting System
home.subtitle: Report, track and analyze postal security incidents with real-time collaboration and centralized governance oversight.
home.content: The PSIRP platform helps postal operators and investigators log incidents, manage follow-up actions, and maintain a secure chain of custody for every report.

infoCards.title: Centralized Reporting
infoCards.description: Capture incidents in one secure place for faster follow-up and better coordination.

infoCards.title: Real-Time Alerts
infoCards.description: Notify the right team immediately so critical issues are addressed without delay.

infoCards.title: Secure Oversight
infoCards.description: Monitor every report with audit-ready controls, compliance traceability, and strong access control.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Need assistance? Reach our support team for questions about incident reporting, system access, or account help.
contact.content:
Email: support@psirp.my
Phone: +60 3 1234 5678
Office: 123 Post St, Kuala Lumpur

help.title: Help
help.subtitle: Learn how to use PSIRP, submit incidents quickly, and find answers to common questions.
help.content: Visit the help resources below to get the most out of the PSIRP system.

details.label: How to report an incident
details.value: Use the report form and attach any supporting evidence before submission.

details.label: Tracking status
details.value: Check incident status from the dashboard after submission.

privacy.title: Privacy & Terms
privacy.subtitle: Your data is protected and handled according to the highest privacy and security standards.
privacy.content: PSIRP collects only the information needed to process incident reports and support your organization. We do not share your personal details with third parties unless required by law.

details.label: Data use
details.value: Incident reports are stored securely and used only for investigation and tracking purposes.

details.label: Retention
details.value: Records are kept according to regulatory requirements and internal retention policies.
